name: Ayon
description: This creature is created from the left arms of Halibel's three Fracción, Sun-Sun, Apache, and Mila Rose. A monster of seemingly unstoppable strength and speed, Ayon's abilities clearly surpass even those of it's own creators. Able to defeat two lieutenants with no effort at all, Ayon is even able to survive several attacks from Head Captain Yamamoto, who has to obliterate him completely just to stop it.
